message:
So, there I was, lounging on the couch with my pup, Charlie, when I suddenly remembered my friend’s warning about keeping a leash handy during our walks. "You'll thank me later!" she said with a smirk. Of course, I thought I could just wing it. Fast forward to that evening, and we encountered a squirrel that could rival a superhero in agility. Charlie took off like a rocket, and I was left behind, yelling like a madman. 😅 

In the chaos, I realized how much easier it would have been if I’d followed her advice. It’s those little preparedness moments that sneak up on us, isn’t it? Now I keep a leash in the car and a spare in my bag, just in case! 

Anyone else have a smug 'I told you so' moment that turned out to be a lesson learned? 🐾
